name: 60.5"x18" Cut Off Base Floor Lamp Black/Brown Metal/Wood - Threshold™: Modern Standing Light for Living Room, Dual Pull Chain
description:
Light up your living space with the sleek and industrial style of this Cut-Off Base Floor Lamp from Project 62™. Made from durable metal and wood in an elegant black finish, this lamp showcases a slim frame standing on a sleek round base with a linen drum shade that will give your room a cozy ambiance and just the right amount of light for reading. The floor lamp comes with a harp and finial for added style, and features a two-socket design with separate pull chains to easily adjust the lighting level to your needs. With a sleek look, this floor lamp blends effortlessly with both classic and contemporary styles.

1962 was a big year. Modernist design hit its peak and moved into homes across the country. And in Minnesota, Target was born — with the revolutionary idea to celebrate design for all. Project 62 embodies this legacy with a collection of modern pieces made for everyday living.
